sectionSubtitle: See how others used this hub to land their dream roles.

testimonials.quote: After 4 years without interviewing, I was completely lost. The 12-week roadmap gave me structure and the AI-aware section was exactly what I needed for my Meta loop.
testimonials.name: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: The behavioral STAR templates saved me. I went from rambling answers to crisp, compelling stories. Got a Staff offer within 2 months of starting my prep.
testimonials.name: James T.

testimonials.quote: I tried prepping on my own for weeks and got nowhere. This hub organized everything I needed in one place. The curated YouTube channels alone were worth it.
testimonials.name: Priya M.

testimonials.quote: Coming from a startup, I had no idea how Big Tech interviews worked now. The platform comparisons and system design resources bridged that gap fast.
testimonials.name: Marcus L.
